creator: marius.halden@modirum.com
text:
I was a bit confused for a second about the portrevision now, but no worriees :)

For using phabricator, I was told to use it for the VTS patch and the modsecurity v3.0.3 patch so I assumed it would be OK for this one too. To be honest I found the experience to be preferable compared to just posting a patch here.

Thanks for helping get this in.
